name: Liberty Latin America Ltd.
business: Liberty Latin America Ltd. is an international provider of fixed, mobile and subsea telecommunications services. It provides residential and B2B services in over 20 countries across Latin America and the Caribbean, Puerto Rico, USVI, and Costa Rica. It also offers enterprise services and wholesale services over its subsea and terrestrial fiber optic cable networks connecting over 30 markets.

exposures.sentence: We are an international provider of fixed, mobile and subsea telecommunications services.

Our business products and services also include enterprise-grade connectivity, data center, hosting and managed solutions, as well as IT solutions with customers ranging from small and medium enterprises to international companies and governmental agencies.
Cyber Security Services, including structured solutions, rapid response, and other professional services;
Software Defined Networking, Internet of Things, Digitalization and Digital Currencies;

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 8.5% equity interest in Liberty Costa Rica closing
catalysts.sentence: During August 2024, we entered into an agreement with the noncontrolling interest owner of Liberty Costa Rica where we agreed to acquire on January 30, 2026 shares representing 8.5% of equity of Liberty Costa Rica for aggregate cash consideration of approximately $84 million, comprising CRC 22 billion ($44 million) and $40 million, with 62.5% of the purchase price due upon closing and the remaining 37.5% due on January 29, 2027.

catalysts.event: Completion of 500 additional mobile tower sites built with Phoenix Tower International
catalysts.sentence: The transaction provides arrangements to extend coverage with a further 500 sites being built by Liberty Latin America and Phoenix Tower International by 2029.
